name: percent-change
title: Percent Change
description: Calculate percent and absolute change between two numbers
author: milos_milovanovic

commands.name: index
commands.title: Calculate Percent Change
commands.description: Calculate percent and absolute change between two numbers

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
